name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for occupational illness in Boise, Idaho?
description: 1 year from diagnosis, max 2 years; notify employer first[1].

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim for occupational illness in Boise, Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1 year from diagnosis, max 2 years; notify employer first[1].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Typically 1 year from last exposure or disability, but up to 2 years max in some cases.

Idaho Code requires claims within 1 year of injury/disease knowledge, not exceeding 2 years from exposure[1].

- Clock starts at diagnosis linking to work.
- Minimum 60 days employment required[1].
- Late filings rarely excused.

File promptly with Industrial Commission; lawyer ensures compliance amid nuances.
